name: Cheri Reynhout McKay
description: Cheri Reynhout McKay is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Brimley, MI. There is 1 indoor hard court. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: DeTour Village - DeTour Public School
description: Come play pickleball at DeTour Village - DeTour Public School in De Tour Village, MI! There are 3 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
open_play_schedule: Visit our Facebook page detour village pickleball

name: DeTour Village Outdoor Courts - Veterans Park
description: Come play pickleball at DeTour Village Outdoor Courts - Veterans Park in De Tour Village, MI! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
